name: Artrya Limited
analysis: AYA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$5.1500. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.3600, stop A$4.3263, target A$8.4611 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
